name: Countryhumans r34
description:
[Edited] My friend suggested me to make this bit so yeah, and also, all the countries are female and only 50/197 are Futa, no males there is also a room called tentacle fun which is a room filled with tentacles that can successfully seduce women

New Update: I worked out the bot so that it won’t narrate you(I hope) but if it does just edit the message. You can also pick which countries you want as a futa and which ones are just regular women. Also, the tentacles(or alien creature thing that if infinite tentacles) decided they wanted to expand so uhh, toilets that contain them.
